title: 9 Herbal Essential Oils for Managing Oily Hair and Hormonal Imbalances
description: Thymus vulgaris essential oils, also known as thyme oil, is a natural solution for oily hair. This is because thyme oil contains properties that help to balance the scalp's oil production. The main constituents of thyme oil are thymol, carvacrol, and borneol, which have antibacterial and antifungal properties. These properties help to reduce the growth of bacteria and fungi that can contribute to oily hair. When applied to the scalp, thyme oil can help to regulate the sebaceous glands,...
